creator: firejet@users.sourceforge.net
text:
On a newly-installed FreeBSD 6.1 system with GENERIC kernel, Qt 3.3.5 and KDE 3.5.1 installed, all KDE source apps (and maybe others) that I try to compile refuse to do so. The same error comes up every time: libtool: link: cannot find library `'
and make exits. Might have something to do with another error, something like "KLocale: cannot find "" in catalog". Very annoying. Seems the configure scripts can't find the Qt directories properly.

How-To-Repeat: Install all packages and ports for FreeBSD 6.1 and try to compile any source KDE app.
